smartFriendsIP.label: IP address
smartFriendsIP.validatorErrorText: The entered format is invalid. Example: 192.168.1.1

smartFriendsIPError.text: The entered format is invalid. Example: 192.168.1.1

items.text: WARNING: These values should only be changed by experienced users and only in exceptional cases. Incorrect values can cause the adapter to stop working.

smartFriendsPort.label: Port
smartFriendsPort.tooltip: Enter the port number specific for your gateway
smartFriendsPort.validator: if (!data.smartFriendsPort) return false; return Number.isInteger(data.smartFriendsPort) && data.smartFriendsPort > 0 && data.smartFriendsPort < 65536;
smartFriendsPort.validatorErrorText: The entered port number is invalid. It should be an integer between 1 and 65535. Example: 12345

smartFriendsPortError.text: The entered port number is invalid. It should be an integer between 1 and 65535. Example: 12345
smartFriendsPortError.hidden: if (!data.smartFriendsPort) return false; return Number.isInteger(data.smartFriendsPort) && data.smartFriendsPort > 0 && data.smartFriendsPort < 65536;

smartFriendsCSymbol.label: CSymbol
smartFriendsCSymbol.tooltip: Enter the CSymbol specific for your gateway
smartFriendsCSymbol.validatorErrorText: The entered format is invalid. It should start with a letter, followed by 5 digits and end with a letter. Example: D12345A

smartFriendsCSymbolError.text: The entered format is invalid. It should start with a letter, followed by 5 digits and end with a letter. Example: D12345A

smartFriendsShcVersion.label: SHCVersion
smartFriendsShcVersion.tooltip: Enter the SHCVersion specific for your gateway
smartFriendsShcVersion.validatorErrorText: The entered format is invalid. Example: 3.7.4

smartFriendsShcVersionError.text: The entered format is invalid. Example: 3.7.4

smartFriendsShApiVersion.label: SHAPIVersion
smartFriendsShApiVersion.tooltip: Enter the SHAPIVersion specific for your gateway
smartFriendsShApiVersion.validatorErrorText: The entered format is invalid. Example: 3.7.4

smartFriendsShApiVersionError.text: The entered format is invalid. Example: 3.7.4

ignoreSslErrors.label: Ignore SSL errors
ignoreSslErrors.tooltip: Defines whether to ignore SSL errors when communicating with the gateway. Only enable if you know what it means.
